summary: PR #2235 changes only src/melee/if/ifstatus.c, replacing a near-match helper-based traversal for ifStatus_802F6194 with explicit in-function control flow over HSD_GObj links. The author states this reached a full binary match checked locally in objdiff and decomp.me, but the slice contains no review comments, CI output, or independent verifier log.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; rewrites ifStatus_802F6194 traversal and removes the local nth_node helper.

what_changed.text: Removed the static inline helper nth_node, which walked a linked list with a for loop and returned the nth node.
Removed the near-match comments on ifStatus_802F6194: '99.81% match' and the decomp.me scratch URL XGFpw.

Rewrote ifStatus_802F6194 to initialize gx_head from node->next_gx, track gx_cur and gx_next, and use explicit labels check_done and advance_node to advance through gx_cur->next until i reaches n or the list ends.
The function still returns NULL when node is NULL or n is negative.

smart_moves.text: Kept the rewrite tightly scoped to one function and one source file, avoiding unrelated data, header, or split changes.
Used direct control flow rather than an extracted helper where the PR body says the helper-based version was only a near-match.
Introduced local traversal names gx_head, gx_next, and gx_cur, making the pointer roles more explicit than the previous single gx temporary.

decomp_lessons.text: A helper abstraction that is logically equivalent can still prevent a binary match; for this function, inlining the traversal into the original function shape was the chosen matching strategy.

When replacing a near-match loop/helper with gotos, keep the tactic narrow and tie it to verifier evidence; in this slice, the author claims local objdiff and decomp.me verification, but no verifier output is included.

naming_conventions.text: Traversal temporaries in this rewrite use gx_ role names: gx_head for the initial next_gx value, gx_cur for the current node, and gx_next for the next linked-list node.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Removed a small static inline helper and expressed the traversal directly in ifStatus_802F6194, likely to match original branch and local-variable lifetime shape.
Used explicit goto labels check_done and advance_node to control loop entry and advancement instead of a for loop, preserving early return behavior when the traversal reaches NULL or i >= n.

follow_up_queries: near-match helper-based traversal direct control-flow equivalent

notes: Changed-file metadata and diff are strong: exactly one file changed, with one hunk in src/melee/if/ifstatus.c.

The match claim is author-reported in the PR body: 'checked in my objdiff locally and in decomp.me.' No objdiff output, CI log, reviewer confirmation, or decomp.me result snapshot is included in the slice.
There are no issue comments, review comments, or reviews in the loaded context, so no reviewer intent or acceptance status can be inferred.
PR state is CLOSED and merged_at is null in metadata; do not infer this landed.

accepted_candidate_records.title: ifStatus_802F6194 helper traversal replaced with direct control flow
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2235, src/melee/if/ifstatus.c removed the local nth_node helper and rewrote ifStatus_802F6194 with explicit gx_head/gx_cur/gx_next traversal and goto labels check_done and advance_node. The author described this as replacing a near-match helper-based traversal with a direct control-flow equivalent for a full binary match.

source_update_candidates.title: Document narrow exception for direct goto-shaped control flow when a natural loop/helper remains near-match
source_update_candidates.text: This PR is potential supporting evidence that direct label/goto control flow may be justified for a specific function when a helper or natural loop remains a near-match and verifier evidence is supplied. Any standard update should keep this as a narrow matching tactic, not a preference over natural loops.
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards prefer natural loops and require evidence for matching tactics. This PR may be useful as a curated example of an exception, but the slice lacks independent verification output.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the author-reported full binary match as independently verified; no objdiff output or review confirmation is included.
Do not generalize this PR into a rule that goto rewrites are preferred over natural loops; the evidence is limited to one function and one claimed match.
Do not infer merge or acceptance status from the PR being closed; merged_at is null.
